discountDescription: Running a sale can help you to attract more customers and encourage them to spend more. The discount you offer is totally up to you.
are-you-sure-remove: Are you sure you want to remove
deleting-service-description: This will permanently delete the class and all associated data. It cannot be recovered.
pauseDescription: This will pause the class without deleting any data. It will be temporarily removed from the booking options.
areYouSurePause: Are you sure you want to pause
groupBooking: Switching this on means class is now group-based
add-service-description: Start with simply giving your service a catchy name, and then start digging in and make it memorable!
hero-title: Easiest Way of Booking Wellness Services
hero-description: Your Path to wellness starts here. Finding and reserving top wellness services around you is now simple using Gondli
explore-description: Gondli links you with top-tier practitioners, crafting a holistic experience tailored to your well-being. Discover a network of experts dedicated to enhancing your mind, body, and spirit. Welcome to a wellness journey that goes beyond the ordinary.
features-title: Features Like You Never Seen Before
features-description: and thats not all. Gondli's Innovative approach revolutionizes the way you treat yourself, simplifies making life-changing decisions and bringing the community together. Do you want to be a part of it?
features-search_en-description: Enjoy premium access to a range of services, exclusive discounts, and personalized recommendations.
features-stories-description: Venues can share real-time updates and insights, keeping you informed and inspired on your wellness journey.
features-gamification-description: Earn your badges and karma points - redeemable for service discounts or charity events, adding an exciting dimension to your wellness experience.
features-content-description: Immerse yourself in a world of digital content, where you can access audio and video offerings from the comfort of home.
features-insights-description: Access detailed insights into your business performance. Track service popularity to make informed decisions and optimize your offerings.
features-scheduling-description: Easily manage bookings, cancellations, and rescheduling. Receive instant updates to keep your schedule organized and your clients happy.
features-loyalty-description: Boost customer loyalty with personalized messages and exclusive promotions. Keep clients engaged and encourage repeat buys with retention strategies.
features-optimization-description: Reduce empty slots with automated reminders and last-minute offers. Maximize occupancy and increase your revenue with our smart booking solutions.
solutions-description: Gondli is dedicated to improving the experience for clients and companies in equal measure
solutions-local-description: Gondli connects Swiss businesses with local wellness enthusiasts.
solutions-flexible-description: Easily list and manage services on Gondli.
solutions-visibility-description: Boost visibility as a business within the Swiss wellness community.
solutions-trustworthy-description: Build trust with Gondli's verification and review system.
solutions-seamless-description: Ensure hassle-free transactions for both businesses and customers.
solutions-targeted-description: AI-assisted search links businesses with their ideal customers.
testimonials-title: What Our Users Are Saying About Us
testimonial: Discovering Gondli was a game-changer for me! The platform seamlessly connected me with top-notch wellness practitioners, making it effortless to prioritize self-care. From soothing spa experiences to invigorating fitness sessions, Gondli has transformed the way I approach my well-being.
waitlist-description: Join the waitlist to stay informed about all the exciting new releases and never miss one.
join-waitlist-welcome-description: We would like to ask you few more questions to make your experience even better when launching Gondli.
something-went-wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
journey-description: Gondli is an innovative platform designed to revolutionize the wellness industry by providing both wellness seekers and service providers with a seamless and enriching experience. Our mission is to enhance the journey towards better health and well-being by connecting individuals with top-tier services and empowering providers to reach their ideal clients. We believe that wellness is a deeply personal journey, and with the right tools, resources, and connections, everyone can achieve a healthier, more balanced life.
distinctive-description: We are dedicated to building meaningful connections and a strong sense of community. Our focus is on helping individuals find the right wellness services while empowering providers to succeed in the digital age. Here's what makes us different:
distinctive-locality-description: We connect users with trusted, local wellness service providers, ensuring that they have access to high-quality, convenient services within their own communities. This local focus helps create stronger, more reliable connections and ensures that wellness is accessible to everyone.
distinctive-empowerment-title: Customer Support and Service Provider Empowerment
distinctive-empowerment-description: We equip wellness providers with the tools they need to succeed. From easy service management to enhanced visibility, Gondli empowers providers to streamline their operations and focus on delivering exceptional care to their clients. This focus on provider empowerment allows us to create a thriving ecosystem of wellness services.
distinctive-trust-description: Gondli places a strong emphasis on trust and quality. Through our robust review and verification system, users can feel confident that the services they receive meet high standards. This creates a safer, more reliable wellness journey for all participants.
connections-description: We believe that change starts from within. By fostering authentic relationships between wellness seekers and providers, we aim to create a thriving community that encourages self-improvement, mindfulness, and collective well-being. Our platform offers a range of features designed to make this journey smoother, from streamlined service management for providers to personalized experiences for users.
dashboard-discount-title: The mother’s day sales event starts April 1!
dashboard-discount-description: We’re bringing mother’s day to Gondli! Encourage customers to take advantage of your deals and score higher sales
dashboard-recentActivities-activity2: [Jennifer A.] Booked your service [Gentle Flow Yoga Class]
dashboard-recentActivities-activity3: [James C.] Booked your service [Restorative Yoga and Meditation]
movement-description: Gondli is not just a platform—it's a movement towards a more mindful, balanced, and connected world. Whether you are a service provider looking to expand your reach or an individual seeking the best wellness services, Gondli offers the solutions you need to succeed. We invite you to join our community today and begin your journey towards a better quality of life.
join-gondli-title: So, ready to be a part of us?
join-gondli-description: Sign up for free on Gondli to explore wellness that is tailored for you.
preferred-language: Choose your preferred language for Gondli
start-path-to-wellness: Start your path to wellness here
agree: By clicking Continue, you agree to
last-step: One last step and you are all good to go
happy-to-see-you: We are happy to see you here. Let's make the wellness tailored for you.
select-up-to-five: Select up to 5 categories that interest you to get more tailored offers
enter-credentials: Enter your credentials to log in
valid-email-error: Please enter a valid email address.
looking-for: What are you looking for today?
activate-location: Activate location services to discover the well-being you been always looking for - right next to your home.
class-list: and have unlimited access to all the classes listed on Gondli
address: Harmony Haven Wellness Center, 65 Tranquil Terrace, CH-8003 Zurich, Switzerland
show-it: Would you like to show it off?
How do you want to be called?: How do you want to be called?
Enter the Company's name and also the na: Enter the Company's name and also the name of your venue, which will be the title of the listing
Upload logo of your company that will be: Upload logo of your company that will be used for your venue's listing
Give us a brief introduction of your ven: Give us a brief introduction of your venue, let the users know who you are and what you offer to them
Add some photos of your venue: Add some photos of your venue
You will need at least 5 photos to get s: You will need at least 5 photos to get started. You can add more or make changes later
Make sure to put the pin on the correct: Make sure to put the pin on the correct spot
Double check the information provided in: Double check the information provided in the last step
Select your working days and hours: Select your working days and hours. You will be asked about exact times for each classes later
Do you provide additional comfort option: Do you provide additional comfort options? (Skippable)
Enhance your clients experience: Enhance your clients' experience by offering personalized comfort options. Let your clients select their preferences, ensuring a tailored and relaxing experience every time they book.
What types of services do you offer to u: What types of services do you offer to users?
Select all the types you offer to your u: Select all the types you offer to your users. On the next step you will be available to fill this categories with services you offer
What services do you offer to users?: What services do you offer to users?
Fill out all the services you offer to u: Fill out all the services you offer to users into different categories. make sure to include every detail tailored for great user's experience.
Tell guests about your special additions: Tell guests about your special additions
Select all the amenities available in yo: Select all the amenities available in your venue
This is an optional step, but important: This is an optional step, but important to consider while trying to get your first customer
Offer discount to your first 3 customers: Offer discount to your first 3 customers
Offer discount if customers book for at: Offer discount if customers book for at least 3 people
Your Service Provider's profile is ready: Your Service Provider's profile is ready and one click away to publish. During the review, you explore your Dashboard to start scoring sales. Thank you for joining us!
Do you want to add a list of your practi: Do you want to add a list of your practitioners? (Skippable)
Add yoga instructors: Add yoga instructors, masseurs, and other wellness professionals to your listing, so clients can choose their preferred practitioner when booking. You can later attach practitioners to different services.
Enter new service name to create another: Enter new service name to create another entry
Offer discount if customers book for at: Offer discount if customers book for at least 3 persons
membership-modal-title-heading: Choose the plan that suits you the best
membership-modal-pro-link: Check Digital Content available for Pro
membership-modal-free-plan-description: Perfect for newcomers to the world of wellness, our services offer a supportive environment for those just beginning their journey. Let us help you embark on the path to improved health and well-being.
membership-modal-pro-plan-description: Ideal for wellness lovers, who know what’s best for them and are in constant search of well-being
subscription-pro-subscription-bottom-tex: Ideal for wellness lovers, who know what’s best for them and are in constant search of well-being
subscription-monthly-plan-additional: Pay 29.00 CHF monthly on this day every month.
subscription-yearly-plan-additional: Pay 288.00 CHF for annual plan and get 60 CHF discount
subscription-cancelation-policy-p5: billing date for a partial refund.
payment-modal-loading-description: Payment is being processed. Please, do not close the window before the process is fully complete.
payment-modal-complete-description: Congratulations! You've become a Gondli pro and have unlocked additional benefits for your journey toward well-being. You can start exploring the limitless things that are already at your fingertips!
tell-us-about-you: Tell us a little bit about you
photos-description: Uploading correct pictures that are visually appealing helps to attract customers.
location-description: Give us a brief description of the location to make it easier for customers to find you.
venue-description: Welcome to Harmony Haven, where tranquility meets rejuvenation in the heart of Zurich's serene Seefeld district. Nestled in the midst of picturesque landscapes and overlooking the calming waters of Lake Zurich, our wellness center is a sanctuary dedicated to enhancing your overall well-being.
working-hours-description: Determine your working hours, let the users know when bookings can be received
amenities-description: Tell us what's the other benefits of visiting you
promotions-description: Promotions are a great way to boost sales, especially at the start.
first-customers-discount: Offer discount to your first 3 customers
group-booking-discount: Offer discount if customers book for at least 3 people
instant-booking-description: If you are listing your venue only on Gondli, turning on this feature is recommended. When this is on, bookings are accepted automatically by your calendar. When off, you will need to accept or decline booking requests manually.
advance-notice-description: How much notice do you need between a guest's booking and their arrival?
same-day-notice-description: How late in the day can a guest book for a same-day check-in?
preparation-time-description: How much time do you need between guests to clean and prepare your space?
availability-window-description: How far in advance can guests book your listing?
flexible-description: Full refund 1 day prior to arrival
moderate-description: Full refund 5 days prior to arrival
firm-description: Full refund for cancellation up to 30 days before check-in. If booked fewer than 30 days before check-in, full refund for cancellations made within 48 hours of booking and at least 14 days before check-in. After that, 50% refund up to 7 days before check-in. No refund after that.
strict-description: Full refund for cancellations made within 48 hours of booking, if the check-in date is at least 14 days away. 50% refund for cancellations made at least 7 days before check-in. No refund for cancellations made within 7 days of check-in.
